creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #3)
> Add yourself to
> 
> https://wiki.freebsd.org/Perl
> 
> and you can approve it 8-}

That's a strange idea. The idea of groups like perl@, python@ or whatever is so that people with enough knowledge of how things work can review patches.

What you are saying is that while not knowing much about Python, I can add myself to the python group, and then commit updates to lang/python without any review or approval.
